name: poppify
description: Photo-led short-form vertical reels for Instagram / TikTok / YouTube Shorts / Facebook Reels. Upload 1–10 photos, get a captioned 15/30/60s reel with motion, music, and optional voiceover — $0.06 base render, 50 free seeds on signup, no subscription. Bundles HTTP MCP + 4 skills + 3 slash commands. Includes standalone primitives (generate_image, generate_music, generate_voiceover) when the library doesn't have what you need. Not for: text→video generation (use a generative video MCP), 4K horizontal output, or sub-4s clips.
